items.title: Fun with an indecisive AI coding agent
items.content: <article>In which I have some fun with Claude Opus 4.6, a seemingly indecisive AI coding agent.</article>

items.title: Every dependency you add is a supply chain attack waiting to happen
items.content: <article>Dependencies are a huge supply chain security risk; the more of them you have, and the more often you update, the bigger the attack surface.</article>
